young.text: You don't have to be the best. You just have to try your best.
It does not matter how slowly you go, as long as you do not stop.
Believe you can and you're halfway there.
The more you practise, the luckier you get.
Every expert was once a beginner.
Mistakes are proof that you are trying.
A little progress each day adds up to big results.
You are braver than you believe, stronger than you seem, and smarter than you think.
The only way to learn is to try.
Be kind, be fair, play hard.
Fall seven times, stand up eight.
If you can dream it, you can do it.
Champions keep playing until they get it right.
Have fun. That is what it is all about.

standard.text: Success is not final, failure is not fatal: it is the courage to continue that counts.
Hard work beats talent when talent does not work hard.
The only person you should try to be better than is the person you were yesterday.
I have failed over and over and over again in my life. And that is why I succeed.
You miss 100% of the shots you don't take.
Do not let what you cannot do interfere with what you can do.
Sport does not build character. It reveals it.
Persistence can change failure into extraordinary achievement.
The more difficult the victory, the greater the happiness in winning.
It is not the size of the dog in the fight, but the size of the fight in the dog.
Set your goals high, and don't stop till you get there.
I always felt that my greatest asset was not my physical ability, it was my mental ability.
The principle is competing against yourself. It is about self-improvement, about being better than you were the day before.
There may be people that have more talent than you, but there is no excuse for anyone to work harder than you.
What makes something special is not just what you have to gain, but what you feel there is to lose.
A champion is someone who gets up when they can't.
The strength of the team is each individual member. The strength of each member is the team.
I learned that courage was not the absence of fear, but the triumph over it.
Talent wins games, but teamwork and intelligence win championships.
Without self-discipline, success is impossible, period.

mature.text: Excellence is not a singular act, but a habit. You are what you repeatedly do.
The mind is everything. What you think you become.
Knowing yourself is the beginning of all wisdom.
In the middle of difficulty lies opportunity.
The only way to do great work is to love what you do.
What lies behind us and what lies before us are tiny matters compared to what lies within us.
The greatest glory in living lies not in never falling, but in rising every time we fall.
Purpose is what gives life meaning.
The only limit to our realisation of tomorrow will be our doubts of today.
Pressure is a privilege. It only comes to those who earn it.
We do not rise to the level of our expectations. We fall to the level of our training.
The way a team plays as a whole determines its success. You may have the greatest bunch of individual stars in the world, but if they don't play together, the club won't be worth a penny.
Discipline is the bridge between goals and accomplishment.
It is not about perfect. It is about effort. And when you bring that effort every single day, that is where transformation happens.
One man practising sportsmanship is far better than fifty preaching it.
